docs.title: 1a. Prog No :
docs.text: This value is taken from the column 1 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1b. Car/Trolley No
docs.text: This value is taken from column 11 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1c. POZ No
docs.text: This value is taken from column 9 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1d. Operation Info
docs.text: This value is taken from column 15 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1d. Operation Descriptions
docs.text: Bathc File Value Label Equivalent Description 0 NO OPERAT. 1 WATER SLOT 2 HANDLE 3 HINGE 4 D. OPENING Double opening 5 S. O. LEFT Single opening left 6 S. O. RIGHT Single opening right 7 D. O. LEFT Double opening left 8 D. O. RIGHT Double opening right 9 V. O. LEFT 10 RIGHT O. DOOR Right opening door 11 LEFT O. DOOR Left opening door 12 VASISTAS Top opening

docs.title: 1e. Part Assembly Location
docs.text: This value is taken from column 10 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1e. Location Descriptions
docs.text: Bathc File Value Label Equivalent Description 1 UP(Y) Up part 2 RGT(X) Right part 3 BOT(Y) Bottom part 4 LFT(X) Left part ***

docs.title: 1f. Location / Box No
docs.text: This value is taken from column 12 of the batch file. Box number of Trolley.

docs.title: 1g. Value / Part Length
docs.text: This value is taken from column 2 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1h. Frame
docs.text: This value is taken from column 2 and column 13 of the batch file. These values are data with the source tolerance deducted.

docs.title: 1i. Profile Code
docs.text: This value is taken from column 3 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1j. Vendor / Dealer
docs.text: This value is taken from column 16 of the batch file.

docs.title: 1k. Client / Cusotmer / Order No
docs.text: This value is taken from column 8 of the batch file.

docs.title: 2. Barcode Text Descriptions
docs.text:
Sample Barcode:

K1001PROFILE CODE01289400199400

K 1 001 PROFILE CODE 0 1 28940 0 19940 0 Digit 1 Digit 2 Digit 3..5 Digit 6..17 Digit 18 Digit 19 Digit 20..24 Digit 25 Digit 26..30 Digit 31 Fixed Character Trolley Box Profile Code Gasket Info Color Info Cut Length (28940 = 2894.0mm) Fixed Character Other Side Length (19940 = 1994.0mm) Fixed Character

docs.title: Gasket Info
docs.text: Value Description 0 Profile without gasket 1 Profile with gasket

docs.title: Color Info
docs.text: Value Description 1 White profile 2 Bottom colored profile 3 Top colored profile 3 Bottom-Top colored profile

A. SOL Double opening left 8 C. A. SAG Double opening right 9 V. O. LEFT 10 SAG A.KAPI Right opening door 11 SOL A.KAPI Left opening door 12 VASISTAS Top opening
